title: Serialize repository controllers and honor awaiting work
description: Add repository/checkout-wide controller ownership or dedicated controller isolation so two epics cannot concurrently mutate one checkout/index. Keep epic-specific diagnostics while enforcing one Git authority. Make runner detect graph stats.awaiting_human when waves omit gated tasks and return actionable awaiting, never completed. Use real tk graph shape tests and exact tracker staging where needed.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent executes for different epics in one checkout cannot overlap Git/tracker authority; awaiting-only epics report awaiting with gates and never completed; production-shape tests pass.
